case_title: MIGUEL ROSAS VS. KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSAS, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSAS, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY'S MISSION ROCK, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $9,166.33 PRINCIPAL, $346.44 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,737.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
